fi: Farmers Insurance Federal Credit Union (NCUA charter #1074; federal)
schema: UOS universal graph package — Consumer core, single-SEG federal CU, deposits/CD-led

Institution.name: Farmers Insurance Federal Credit Union

charter.charter_type: Federal credit union (FCU), NCUA-chartered and insured
charter.charter_notes: One of the oldest single-SEG FCUs; charter #1074 assigned at founding 1936

identifiers.nmls: NEEDS_FI — not published on public website

Institution.hq: NEEDS_FI — full street address not published on public website; Los Angeles / Woodland Hills CA area inferred from branch list
Institution.field_of_membership: Farmers Insurance Group employees and agents (primary SEG); immediate family/relatives of current members; any U.S. resident via American Consumer Council (ACC) associational path at no cost
Institution.fom_note: ACC is a nonprofit consumer education org — open/associational path makes FOM effectively national
Institution.asset_size: NEEDS_FI — pull from NCUA 5300 call report (charter 1074). Public sources cite ~$1.4B assets historically but no current 5300 was fetched.
jurisdictions: Nationwide (50 states; member-facing operations per FOM)
Institution.brand_voice: Member-centric, not-for-profit; tagline 'High Yields'; mission: 'earn trust and respect, become your most loved Financial Partner'

Product.name: Membership Savings
features: Allpoint + CO-OP ATM access (85,000+ surcharge-free ATMs)

Product.name: Online Savings
features: no branch or call center access (online-only)
1.00% APY bonus with $1,000+ monthly direct deposit into FIGFCU checking
base rate 1.75% APY; with DD bonus 2.75% APY (as of Sept 18, 2025 rate sheet)

Product.name: Rainy Day Savings
features: 1.75% APY on balances up to $2,000; 0.10% APY on balances over $2,000
must fund via recurring ACH or qualifying external funds
limited to 2 withdrawals per calendar year ($20 fee each excess withdrawal)
no debit/check/ATM/online/mobile access — branch or phone only

Product.name: Holiday Club Account
features: 0.25% APY (per rate sheet Club Accounts line)

Product.name: Health Savings Account (HSA)
features: requires HDHP; IRS contribution limits apply
tax-advantaged (federal); state tax treatment may differ

Product.name: Tax Saver Account
features: available to agents (Agents section) and consumers

Product.name: Money Market
features: DDEP bonus: additional 0.25% if $1,000+ monthly direct deposit — applied upfront or within 60 days

Product.name: Zero-Fee Checking
features: first box of checks not specified (no check writing noted for Zero-Fee)

Product.name: CashBack Checking
features: $5 monthly cash-back credit with qualifying activities
+1.00% APY savings bonus on Online Savings with $1,000+ monthly direct deposit
qualifying activities: 10 debit POS transactions + $1,000/mo DD + eStatements

Product.name: High Yield Checking
features: 0.20% APY on balances over $5,000 or if not qualifying
+1.00% APY savings bonus on Online Savings with $1,000+ monthly direct deposit
qualifying activities: 10 debit POS transactions + $1,000/mo DD + eStatements

Product.name: Flex-Term Certificate
Product.term: 3, 6, 9 months (3.80% APY promo); 12 months (4.00% APY promo); standard terms up to 60 months
features: choose your term from available options
promo effective 03/31/2026: 3/6/9 months at 3.80% APY; 12 months at 4.00% APY
new money only for promotional rates
IRA Certificates available for 12-month term only
auto-renews at same term at rate in effect at maturity
dividends compounded monthly, credited at maturity

Product.name: No Penalty Certificate (9-Month)
features: 4.00% APY promotional rate (limited time, new funds only)
no early withdrawal penalty after first 30 days
one withdrawal per calendar month after initial 30-day lock period
IRA share certificates do not qualify
auto-renews to standard 9-month certificate at maturity

Product.name: Share Certificate (Standard / Jumbo Terms)
features: DDEP bonus +0.25% for 36mo+ if $1,000+/mo direct deposit (applies at opening, verified within 60d)
dividends to another account monthly option
special 24-month certificate available for youth (see Youth Accounts)

Product.name: IRA Certificate
features: rates mirror standard/jumbo certificate rates by term
short terms (3/6/9mo promo) not available for IRA certs

Product.name: Simplified Employee Pension (SEP) IRA
features: available in Agents section — for self-employed agents

Product.name: Kid Membership Savings (M3 Money Club)
features: must be joint with parent/legal guardian

Product.name: Kid 24-Month Certificate
features: up to 6 additional deposits ($25 minimum each)
dividends can auto-deposit monthly to another account

Product.name: Teen Free Checking
features: free Tulee digital banking + mobile deposit

Product.name: Teen Club 24-Month Certificate
features: up to 6 additional deposits ($100 minimum each)

Product.name: Young Adult 24-Month Certificate
features: rate NEEDS_FI (rate page shows 2.75% APY for 24mo standard, likely same)
up to 6 additional deposits ($100 minimum each)
earns higher dividends than Membership Savings

Product.name: Farmers Premium Trust Account
features: for Farmers agents — holds insurance premium collections

Feature.name: Allpoint + CO-OP ATM Network (85,000+ surcharge-free)
Feature.cost: free in-network; out-of-network fees may apply from ATM owner

Feature.name: Direct Deposit Bonus (DDEP)
Feature.cost: free; triggers rate bonus on Online Savings (+1.00%), CDs 36mo+ (+0.25%), MM (+0.25%), checking rewards

Feature.name: Round It Up (debit purchase rounding savings)
No minimum balance / no monthly maintenance fee (all checking)
Certificate early-withdrawal penalty
Feature.cost: substantial penalty (amount NEEDS_FI per term from TISA disclosure)

Feature.name: DDEP +0.25% bonus for Certificates 36mo+ and MM
Feature.cost: free; requires $1,000+/mo direct deposit; applied upfront for certs; forfeited if DD lapses

Feature.name: CO-OP Shared Branch Network (5,000+ locations)
Feature.cost: free for deposits, withdrawals, loan payments, transfers, money orders

Segment.name: Consumer (core)
Segment.definition_criteria: all eligible members — Farmers employees/agents, family, ACC associational path

Segment.name: Farmers Agent
Segment.definition_criteria: licensed Farmers Insurance agents; have access to Agent-specific deposit and loan products

Segment.name: Youth (Kids / Teens / Young Adults)
Segment.definition_criteria: members under 18 (joint w/ parent); young adults 18-22 (Young Adult cert)

Segment.name: Higher-Balance / Jumbo
Segment.definition_criteria: $100,000+ certificate balances; jumbo CD and MM rate tiers

Channel.description: Online account opening (MeridianLink Consumer POS) + Tulee web banking at tulee.figfcu.org
rules: online open: new-member online via MeridianLink + E-SIGN consent sequence

Channel.description: Tulee Mobile App (iOS: App Store ID 1583994857; Android: com.farmersinsurancegroup.cdpconcon)
8 owned FIGFCU branches: Phoenix AZ; Round Rock TX; Merced CA; Woodland Hills CA; Overland Park KS; Grand Rapids/Kraft Lake MI; Grand Rapids/Kraft Meadows 2 MI (ATM only); Oklahoma City OK
Channel.plus_shared: CO-OP shared branch network (5,000+ additional locations nationwide)
rules: full account opening and loan apps at own branches only

Channel.description: 55,000+ Allpoint surcharge-free ATMs (per 2026 home page banner) + 30,000+ CO-OP surcharge-free ATMs; own branch ATMs at 8 locations
Tulee digital banking suite: internal/external transfers, card controls, mobile deposit, eDocuments, skip-a-pay, credit score, subscription manager

Pricing.name: Membership Savings APY
Pricing.rate_note: Rates current as of September 18, 2025 per rate page disclosure; all non-cert rates subject to change retroactively to beginning of month per Board meeting

Pricing.name: Online Savings APY (with/without DD)
Pricing.rate_note: Rate bonus +1.00% for min $1,000 monthly ACH DD or Agent Net Check into FIGFCU checking; rates subject to change

Pricing.name: Rainy Day Savings APY
Pricing.rate: 1.75% on balances up to $2,000; 0.10% on balances over $2,000

Pricing.name: High Yield Checking APY
Pricing.rate: 5.00% on balances up to $5,000 (qualifying); 0.20% on balances over $5,000 or non-qualifying
Pricing.qualifying_criteria: 1) $1,000/mo min DD, 2) enrolled in eStatements, 3) 10 debit POS transactions/month

Pricing.name: Flex-Term Certificate Promo APY (effective 03/31/2026)
Pricing.rate_note: New money only; $1,000 minimum; IRA available for 12mo only; subject to change or end without notice

Pricing.name: No Penalty 9-Month Certificate APY (limited time promo)
Pricing.rate: 4.00% APY promotional (base 3.93%); $1,000 minimum; new funds only

Pricing.name: IRA Savings Rates
Pricing.rate: Variable Rate IRA: 0.15%; High Yield IRA Savings: 2.25%

Pricing.name: Rainy Day excess withdrawal fee
Pricing.rate: $20 per withdrawal beyond 2 per calendar year

Pricing.name: CashBack Checking monthly $5 reward + $10 ATM rebate
Pricing.rate: $5/month cash-back + up to $10 ATM surcharge rebate (qualifying)

Disclosure.name: Truth in Savings Act (TISA) / Electronic Services Disclosure and Agreement
Disclosure.notes: PDF available for download from figfcu.org/tisa; covers all deposit accounts

Disclosure.name: Service Charges and Fees Schedule
Disclosure.notes: Referenced in checking disclosures ('refer to the Credit Union’s Service Charges and Fees schedule located in the Truth-In-Savings Disclosure'); specific fee amounts NEEDS_FI — separate PDF not fetched

Disclosure.name: Reg E error investigation result notice
Reg E error claim denial written explanation
Reg E overdraft opt-in disclosure notice
Truth in Savings APYE statement disclosure
Reg Z closed-end advertising disclosure requirements
Remittance transfer pre-payment and receipt disclosure
Reg E periodic statement with EFT detail
Credit card account-opening Schumer Box disclosure
Prepaid card pre-acquisition short-form and long-form disclosures
Reg Z credit advertising trigger-term disclosures
Truth in Savings advertising APY disclosure
NCUA official advertising statement / insurance logo

RuleThreshold.name: Certificate early-withdrawal penalty
RuleThreshold.condition: withdrawal before maturity (except No-Penalty cert post-30d)
RuleThreshold.outcome_action: substantial penalty applies (amount NEEDS_FI per term from TISA)

RuleThreshold.name: High Yield / CashBack Checking qualification
RuleThreshold.condition: monthly cycle: 10 debit POS txns + $1,000 ACH DD + enrolled eStatements
RuleThreshold.outcome_action: qualify: 5.00% APY + $10 ATM rebate (HYC) or $5 cash + $10 ATM rebate (CBC); fail: 0.20% APY, no rebate

RuleThreshold.name: DDEP bonus 60-day verification window (certs/MM)
RuleThreshold.condition: qualifying DD not verifiable at opening
RuleThreshold.outcome_action: first DD must arrive within 60 days; else cert bonus forfeited (rate reduced 0.25%)

RuleThreshold.name: Rainy Day Savings withdrawal limit
RuleThreshold.condition: more than 2 withdrawals per calendar year
RuleThreshold.outcome_action: $20 fee per excess withdrawal; must be paid at time of withdrawal; no debit/ATM/digital access

RuleThreshold.name: No Penalty Certificate 30-day initial lock
RuleThreshold.condition: withdrawal within first 30 days of No Penalty Certificate
RuleThreshold.outcome_action: standard early withdrawal penalty applies; penalty waived after day 30 (1 withdrawal per calendar month)

RuleThreshold.name: APY-accuracy vs effective rate sheet (707.8(b))
RuleThreshold.outcome_action: must match effective Pricing version or BLOCK

RuleThreshold.name: FOM eligibility precedes opening
RuleThreshold.condition: prospective member must qualify under FIGFCU FOM: Farmers employee/agent, family member, or ACC path
RuleThreshold.outcome_action: verify FOM eligibility before account open

RuleThreshold.name: Membership share (Membership Savings) required
RuleThreshold.outcome_action: member must open and maintain Membership Savings as par/share account

RuleThreshold.name: OD opt-in gate before fee (Reg E / Privilege Pay)
RuleThreshold.outcome_action: Privilege Pay opt-in required before charging OD fee on debit/ATM; Zero-Fee has no OD fee

RuleThreshold.name: Reg E 45-day extended investigation with provisional credit
Reg E member liability caps by reporting window
HMDA rate-spread reporting threshold above APOR
UCC midnight deadline for check return
45-day advance notice before card rate/term change
CARD Act penalty fee safe-harbor cap
12-month APR increase prohibition on existing balances
Reg II debit interchange fee cap
Reg II minimum unaffiliated network requirement
Credit card payment same-day crediting cutoff
Credit balance refund window (7 business days)
Gift card 12-month inactivity threshold before fee
National DNC registry refresh interval (31 days)

edges.note: waived after day 30 per promo terms

customer_account_note: Customer[] and Account[] are intentionally empty. Bulk member PII is never ingested into the KG. Individual member records live in FIGFCU core system only. These arrays remain empty by design per KG-R56 build guardrail.

public_data_gaps.rate_date_note: All rates on deposit-account-rates page are dated September 18, 2025 per page disclosure. Certificate promos (Flex-Term) effective 03/31/2026. Rates may have changed since these dates.
